feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP
entry.content: how to change the country postal code set in the sap public edition

entry.title: Add Custom Fields in S/4HANA Public Cloud Migration Cockpit Template for Product Master
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,


We are in the final stages of our S/4HANA Public Cloud go-live and are using the Migration Cockpit (Migrate Your Data App) for product master data migration.


We need to include the following custom fields in the Product master - Source Data template as they are critical for our operations and data integrity:




  2. Document




  4. Basic Data Text




  6. Document Version




  8. Inspection Text




  10. Internal Comment



These fields are PERSON_NAME from a business perspective and essential for completing the product data upload before go-live.


Kindly guide us on the recommended approach:




  • How to enhance the migration template in S/4HANA Public Cloud?




  • Can we use the "Custom Migration Object" app or key user extensibility to achieve this?




  • If not feasible directly, what is the SAP-recommended alternative for loading these fields?



Please treat this as Go-Live Critical and advise urgently.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to add other depreciation areas to migrated assets and delete data for migrated assets
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support, 

If I want to add value data to other depreciation areas for assets migrated using the "Migration Cockpit" app, is it possible to do so?
(Please tell me if there is a way other than using the "Post Transfer Values ​​- For Legacy Asset" app.) 
If possible, please tell me how to add data. 

 

Also, is it possible to delete data for many assets that have been migrated at once? (Please answer using a method other than using the Reset Transaction Data job template from the app Schedule Accounting Data Corrections.)
If possible, please tell me how to delete data.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Withholding tax code issue
entry.content:
When posting an invoice using FB60 in SAP, specifically related to Withholding Tax (WHT). after posting, the "Tax Code" field in the document is shows only the Tax Type instead of the tax code filed

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Purchasing tax for Canada import
entry.content:
Hello, 

we did set all the taxes for Canada's jurisdictions, but we were not able to find the place, where to set rule for imports from USA as non taxable. 

We have two plants in Ontario and Quebec, so we have set two tax code plus one as Tax exempt. As taxes are set according to ship to address, we always see Ontario or Quebec taxation. 

Any idea, how to set Tax exempt for all orders coming from US Supplier?

We have S4HC public

Thank you

Lucie

entry.title: Open Journal Entry App in a New Tab from P&L or G/L Reports
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In SAP Fiori, when we view Profit & Loss statements or G/L line items and click on a journal entry number, the system opens the related app (e.g., Manage Journal Entries or Journal Entry Analyzer) in the same tab, replacing the current screen.

This is inconvenient for users who need to compare or switch between the report and the journal.

Is there a way to configure SAP Fiori Launchpad to open these apps in a new tab?

Based on what I've found so far, it seems that there is no standard way to open a new tab in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

entry.title: How to Migrate Stock from IM Managed to EWM Managed Sloc in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Expert !

We already live in MM-IM managed and we are activating EWM sloc to several Warehouses.

Then we need to migrate hundreds of Material, Batch and Handling Unit from IM Managed to EWM Managed sloc.

We have seen the Migration Cockpit template (LTMC), but seems this is for fresh initial balance stock, not for transferring from IM-Sloc to EWM-sloc.

Can anyone please share experience and idea to migrate these stocks?

Thank you,

Melani

entry.title: How to Create a Pro Forma invoice (F5) for multiple sales orders as VF01 is restricted to 17 orders
entry.content: How to Create a Pro Forma invoice (F5) for multiple sales orders as VF01 is restricted to 17 orders and in the billing due list these orders are not available?

entry.title: Getting support on SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition/Transportation Management (TM) module
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Background
Our team is researching the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Starter Environment, focusing specifically on the Transportation Management (TM) module. We are particularly interested in inbound and outbound ocean freight scenarios covered by best practice scope items 6W2, 6W3, and 6W4 of the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

Problem Description
In the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app, there is a field labeled “Movement Type” which is set by default to “Door to Door.” Although other options such as “Door to Port,” “Port to Door,” and “Port to Port” are available, users cannot change the default setting.

The following error message is displayed:
“Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Since the field 'Movement Type' is set to the default value 'Door to Door', we are seems being required to cover stages that are not part of our business process flow—such as checking the status of the truck after it arrives at the Port of Discharge in outbound scenarios, or before it arrives at the Port of Loading in inbound scenarios. Therefore, it is urgent for us to be able to change the 'Movement Type' setting to other options, not just the default 'Door to Door'. 

Steps to Reproduce

Outbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Sales Order using the Manage Sales Orders → Create Sales Orders – VA01 app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    At this point, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The following error message is displayed:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Inbound Scenario:

  1. Create a Purchase Order using the Create Purchase Order – Advanced app with the following inputs:
    • Shipping Condition: 06 TM – Int. Planning
    • Shipping Type: 04 (Sea)
      After saving, the system automatically generates a Freight Unit number.
  2. Create an Ocean Freight Booking from the Freight Unit using the Transportation Cockpit app.
  3. Open the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app and select the corresponding Freight Booking record.
    Again, the Movement Type is set to “Door to Door” and cannot be changed.
    The same error message appears:
    “Movement type can't be changed. Requirement documents are assigned.”
    Message no. /SCMTMS/OM171

Questions

1. In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, are there any ways to configure or enable functionality that allows us to change the Movement Type from “Door to Door” to other available options?

2. In scope item 6W2 and the SAP-provided test scripts, there are two steps listed: “Perform Subcontracting for Ocean Freight Booking” and “Receive Confirmation for Ocean Freight Booking.” These steps are not marked as optional. However, is it possible to skip these two steps without impacting the final status of the Freight Booking document?

3. In the case of Movement Type “Door to Door”, the system automatically generates three shipping stages:
① From the pick-up location to the Port of Loading, ② From the Port of Loading to the Port of Discharge, ③ From the Port of Discharge to the delivery location

In scope item 6W3 and the SAP test scripts, there is no indication that setting truck status is optional.
Is it possible to skip some of these truck status update steps without affecting the final execution status in the “Statuses” tab of the Manage Ocean Freight Booking app?
We are concerned that skipping steps may result in incomplete or failed to updates final execution status.

Hope we can get support for above questions soon.

Best Regards,
Tram Anh

entry.title: Changing G/L Master Data from Cash Acct. to Balance Sheet Acct.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We want to change G/L account master data. Originally we followed the approach to simplify the chart of accounts for bank accounts as described here: How to simplify my Chart of Accounts via reducing ... - SAP Community

For this purpose, we have maintained the following G/L accounts in the Customizing Tenant:

Bank Reconciliation Account

 

Bank sub-account

 

 

Now we want to change the Type. 1st step is adjusting 1101920 to make sure it is no longer referencing 11001900. 2nd we want to change 11001900, however the following error message arises although 11001920 is no longer assigned to 11001900.

 

There are no entries in CBC referencing these accounts, however in the test tenant we used the Accounts while applying the simplification approach. The balance in these accounts is ZERO.

How can we change the G/L Master Data Settings in the customizing tenant?

entry.title: Access to Management Bank – Cash Management Application
entry.content:
Which Scope item is required to access the Management Bank – Cash Management application.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to create PO report which includes invoice number in S/4 HANA cloud public edition
entry.content:
Hello, we need a report that shows which invoices are posted for each PO lines.

This report should include also the date of the invoice and should be exportable in excel. Any suggestion on how to do that?

entry.content:
How to delete bank master data in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud

entry.title: Enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team , 

I am new to public cloud development having doubt in implementing enhancement in VF01 SAP public cloud 

requirement is to store the invoice values into a custom table and and send to the invoice details to external API.

how to achieve this .

Do we have to create a BADI or any exist available in Public cloud as in ECC or S4HANA system

or do we have any other alternatives?

please suggest.

Guru

entry.title: Mass Creation of Purchase Orders （6VW)
entry.content:
Dears,

Can anyone told me what item category should I input in Excel template?

I want to create standard PO item. When I input 0, I got below error message

When I input 1, I got below error message:

When I input 2, upload success, but PO item is consignment. 

When I input 3, I got below error message

Please give you advice.

Thank you.

entry.title: Subcontracting value should be added in material price while doing GRN
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Below is the requirement of customer.

I am sending material XX (price 1000 INR) of 1 Kg for subcontracting to supplier, having PO price 200 INR. And receiving same material XX of 1 Kg in batch no. 123. At the time of GRN inventory price of that particular material (batch 123) should be 1200 INR (price of material + subcontracting charges). Is it possible in SAP S/4HANA public cloud? If yes, how can we achieve this?

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Enable selection mode in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
I developed a List Report app using Fiori Elements through RAP.

I wanted to enable the selection mode "Single" so I can single record and use a custom action to open a dialog for further processing.

I already added the table setting "selectionMode" into "Single" in the manifest.json but it doesnt reflect in the app.

When I run app and check the table's selection mode, it shows as undefined.

How can I enable the selectionMode "Single" using Fiori Elements?

entry.title: Save public variants in apps
entry.content:
Hi!

Our customer is running a Public cloud system and wants to start creating public variants in reports to make sure everyone doesnt need to do it by them selfs.

As far as we understand that’s included in the admin role, but can you please advice in which catalog this is included? The admin role is so big and we want to limit to only add this function related to public variants if possible.

Kind Regards, Sanne

entry.title: Quarantine Period in EWM Execution
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How the quarantine period in EWM Execution work with QM? Which report or transaction that can show the stock is quarantine for certain period of time? Will it block the stock from further processing and updating EWM inspection lot? Does it work in Public Cloud?

 

BR,

Ridzuan

entry.title: ISO code P1 is not assigned to a currency key in the valid time period
entry.content:
During migrating the object "Condition record for pricing (general template)" using migration cockpit, we are facing following error:

 

"ISO code P1 is not assigned to a currency key in the valid time period" for all our records in the Simulation Phase.

How to resolve this?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.
